info.title: mooKIT Instructor Express API
info.description: Centralized OpenAPI documentation for the migrated Express instructor backend. Request headers, query parameters, request bodies, response envelopes, examples, and accepted enum values are documented from the docs module registry.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Managed file upload and deletion endpoints.

tags.name: Assessments
tags.description: Assessment management: assignments, quizzes, and exams.

parameters.description: Entity that owns the uploaded file.

parameters.description: Optional entity identifier. Defaults to 0.

get.description: Returns paginated, sorted, and filterable resources attached to the specified entity.

parameters.name: course
parameters.description: Header: course short name used to select the course-scoped database. Alias accepted by validators: x-course.

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Header: authenticated mooKIT user id. Alias accepted by validators: x-user-id.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Entity type name. Must be a valid entity table registered in the entities table.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: Entity record identifier.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: One-based page number. Legacy alias: offset.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum records to return. Legacy alias: size.

parameters.name: sortColumn
parameters.description: Column used for backend sorting. Allowed values: id, created, resource_type, is_primary. Legacy alias: order.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort direction. Legacy alias: sort.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: Optional filter parameter for column: resource_type.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Add one or more resources to an entity. resourceType accepts file, audio, video. Resource id must NOT be included; it is system-generated. Only one resource per entity can be primary.

post.description: Creates a question in the specified section. questionType must be one of: mcq_multi, mcq_single, true_false, fib, descriptive. CourseResourceCreate.description: Course resource write payload. file/audio resources require resourceFileId. New video resources require exactly one of resourceUrl or resourceFileId. Only one resource per entity can be primary. isPrimary, transcoded, and transcriptDownloaded accept booleans or 0/1. Resource id must NOT be included; it is system-generated.

length.description: Non-negative integer or null. For file/audio resources the system stores null.

CourseResourceUpdate.description: Partial update payload for a single course resource. All fields are optional. Only supplied fields are changed; omitted fields retain their current value.

entityType.description: Target entity type. If supplied, the resource is re-associated after validation.

entityId.description: Target entity ID. Must be supplied together with entityType.

videoTimestamp.description: Video timestamp in seconds. Must be greater than or equal to 0.
Video timestamp in seconds. Must be greater than or equal to 0.

content.example: Remember to review dynamic programming examples.
Remember to review dynamic programming examples.

question.example: What is the complexity of merge sort?
question.description: Optional prompt text. Omitted or empty values are stored as null.

options.description: At least one option must have isCorrect=1.
Every option must include id. At least one option must have isCorrect=1.

id.description: Existing option id. Use 0 to create a new option during question update.

question.example: What is the complexity of merge sort?

video.description: Raw Vimeo SDK response wrapper returned by the Vimeo service.

description.example: The exam schedule has been updated.
The exam schedule has been updated.

termName.description: Taxonomy term name. The validator strips HTML tags, trims whitespace, and rejects empty values after sanitization.

instructions.example: Complete all questions within the time limit.

endDapDate.description: End date for DAP (Differently Abled Persons) students.

releaseOn.description: Scheduled release timestamp (Unix). Null when not set.

duration.description: Duration in minutes for non-DAP students. Null when timed is 0.

durationDap.description: Duration in minutes for DAP students. Null when timed is 0. Must be >= duration.

retakeLimit.description: Max retakes allowed. Null when retakeAllowed is 0.

minimumOofTimeMs.description: Minimum out-of-focus time in ms before misconduct detection triggers.

endDapDate.description: End date for DAP students. Must be >= endDate.

releaseOn.description: Scheduled release timestamp. Null when status is 1 defaults to startDate.

duration.description: Duration in minutes for non-DAP students. Required when timed is 1.

durationDap.description: Duration for DAP students. Required when timed is 1. Must be >= duration.

retakeLimit.description: Max retakes. Required when retakeAllowed is 1.

minimumOofTimeMs.description: Out-of-focus threshold in ms. Defaults to 5000.

AssessmentUpdateRequest.description: Partial update payload. All fields are optional; only supplied fields are changed.

randomQuestionCount.description: Number of questions to draw randomly. Null means draw all.
Required when randomizeQuestions is 1. Must be >= 1.

AssessmentSectionUpdateRequest.description: Partial update payload. All fields optional.

AssessmentQuestionPublishedInput.description: Published input wrapper. The status value is extracted and stored as a flat binary flag.

AssessmentQuestion.description: Assessment question. Type-specific fields (options, trueFalseAnswer, fibUseRange, fibRangeLower, fibRangeUpper, blanks) are present only for the matching questionType.

questionText.example: What is the time complexity of binary search?

allowPartialMarks.description: Whether partial marking is allowed. Always 0 for true_false and mcq_single; for fib only when there are more than one blank.

published.description: Published input wrapper. The status value is extracted and stored as a flat binary flag.

fibUseRange.description: Present for fib. 1 = numeric range; 0 = blank answers.

fibRangeLower.description: Present for fib when fibUseRange is 1.

fibRangeUpper.description: Present for fib when fibUseRange is 1. Must be >= fibRangeLower.

blanks.description: Present for fib when fibUseRange is 0.

AssessmentQuestionCreateRequest.description: Create a question. Supply options for mcq_*, trueFalseAnswer for true_false, blanks or fibRange fields for fib.

questionText.example: What is the time complexity of binary search?

allowPartialMarks.description: Default 0. Set 1 to allow partial marking. Not allowed for true_false or mcq_single. For fib, only when there are more than one blank (and fibUseRange is 0).

published.description: Published input wrapper. The status value is extracted and stored as a flat binary flag.

fibUseRange.description: Default 0. Set 1 to use numeric range instead of blank answers for fib.

fibRangeLower.description: Required for fib when fibUseRange is 1.

fibRangeUpper.description: Required for fib when fibUseRange is 1. Must be >= fibRangeLower.

options.description: Required for mcq_single (exactly 1 correct) and mcq_multi (at least 1 correct).

blanks.description: Required for fib when fibUseRange is 0. Each blank needs at least 1 answer.

AssessmentQuestionUpdateRequest.description: Partial update. All fields optional. Providing options replaces all existing options. Providing blanks replaces all existing blanks and answers.

published.description: Published input wrapper. The status value is extracted and stored as a flat binary flag.
